entry.title: IPTC publishes Frequently Asked Questions on C2PA Content Credentials - IPTC
entry.summary: IPTC is the global standards body of the news media. We provide the technical foundation for the news ecosystem.

entry.title: IPTC NewsCodes 2026-Q2 update released - IPTC
entry.summary: IPTC is the global standards body of the news media. We provide the technical foundation for the news ecosystem.

entry.title: Asia Broadcasting Union webinar on C2PA for media, 14 July 2026 - IPTC
entry.summary: Brendan Quinn of the IPTC is presenting and moderating at a webinar hosted by the Asia-Pacific Broadcasting Union called "Building Trust in Media: C2PA, Identity Assertions, and the Future of Media Provenance" on Tuesday 14th July.

entry.title: Registration open for the Media Provenance Summit in Bergen, 22 September 2026 - IPTC
entry.summary: IPTC is the global standards body of the news media. We provide the technical foundation for the news ecosystem.

entry.title: IPTC at Fotoware webinar on Thursday 18 June - IPTC
entry.summary: IPTC is the global standards body of the news media. We provide the technical foundation for the news ecosystem.

entry.title: European AI Office releases Code of Practice on Transparency of AI-Generated Content - IPTC
entry.summary: IPTC is the global standards body of the news media. We provide the technical foundation for the news ecosystem.

entry.title: WordPress 7.0 released, including support for embedded IPTC Alt Text metadata - IPTC
entry.summary: IPTC is the global standards body of the news media. We provide the technical foundation for the news ecosystem.

entry.summary: IPTC is the global standards body of the news media. We provide the technical foundation for the news ecosystem.

entry.title: "The news industry is the spiritiual core of C2PA": the IPTC Media Provenance Summit in Toronto - IPTC
entry.summary: IPTC is the global standards body of the news media. We provide the technical foundation for the news ecosystem.

entry.title: Release C2PA Specification 2.3 · c2pa-org/specifications
entry.summary: Final 2.3 release

entry.title: Release 1.3 · c2pa-org/specifications
entry.summary: This is the 1.3 release

entry.title: Release Release 1.0 · c2pa-org/specifications
entry.summary: The 1.0 web site

entry.title: C2PA - Announcements
entry.summary: The latest news and announcements from C2PA.

entry.title: Event Recap | Verified Video: Authenticity from Capture to Playback
entry.summary: We hosted a conversation on how Content Credentials are making end-to-end provenance for video workflows a reality.

entry.title: Gathering the ecosystem: Reflections from New York Tech Week
entry.summary: We brought about 100 members of the CAI community together for Tech Week in New York. Check out the highlights.

entry.title: Reflecting on the Singapore Content Authenticity Summit 2026
entry.summary: Nearly 200 policymakers, technologists, media leaders, and platform representatives gathered in Singapore to learn about the C2PA standard. Here are the highlights.

entry.title: Your work, your proof: Safe Creative and the future of copyright registration
entry.summary: Learn about how Safe Creative protects creators against content theft, and how they are implementing Content Credentials for transparency in IP registration.

entry.title: How Forensic Photonics verifies digital evidence with Content Credentials
entry.summary: In high-stakes court proceedings, digital evidence has to be trustworthy. Learn how Forensic Photonics' LIFT device adds C2PA metadata to fingerprint images.

entry.title: The three pillars of provenance that make up durable Content Credentials
entry.summary: The triad of technologies that make for permanent Content Credentials and that has the potential to unlock value in the creative economy.

entry.title: The State of Content Authenticity in 2026
entry.summary: As the Content Authenticity Initiative marks five years and 6,000 members, interoperable content provenance is becoming real. With open standards, Content Credentials are now used across devices, media, and AI. 2026 will be a defining year for helping people understand what media is and how it’s made.

entry.title: Event Recap | Proof of Personhood: Provenance and AI Avatars
entry.summary: We recently hosted a conversation on the opportunities and challenges of AI avatars. Check out the highlights.

entry.title: Building trust for the future: a photojournalist’s workflow
entry.summary: David Butow explains why Content Credentials matter to him as a photojournalist and how he includes them in his workflow, from capture to edit to publish.

entry.title: Introducing Content Credentials Foundations: a course for implementers
entry.summary: We're launching an educational video series in partnership with Pixelstream to expedite implementations of the C2PA standard.
